column1: SEEDWARDEN LTV TRACKER — PHASE 1 BASELINE + PHASE 2 APPEND
Purpose: Phase 1 cohort baseline for Phase 2 LTV comparison. Append Phase 2 orders below the PHASE_2_ORDERS_START row.
Phase 1 actuals: 47 orders | $1341 gross revenue | $28.53 AOV | May–June 2026
Net order formula: gross_order_value * 0.935 - 0.20 (Etsy 6.5% txn fee + $0.20 listing fee)
LTV estimate formula: net_order_value * estimated_annual_purchases * estimated_years_retained

column2: Internal order reference (ORD-P1-NNN for Phase 1; ORD-P2-NNN for Phase 2).
Date order created (YYYY-MM-DD). Source: Etsy receipts.
Phase 1 or Phase 2. Never mixed on same row.
Pre-fee revenue. Source: Etsy order total.
gross * 0.935 - 0.20. Actual revenue to Seedwarden.
wild_edibles | medicinal_plants | native_plants | seed_saving | zone_calendar | survival_prep | complete_bundle | mushroom_id | endangered_species | other
Full title of primary guide or bundle purchased.
Zone 3-10; or 'unknown' if buyer did not complete Kit form. Source: Kit subscriber field or order notes. For Phase 1 buyers with no Kit record: infer from geo_state using USDA zone map.
Two-letter US state or CA province. Source: Etsy API.
Pacific_Northwest | West_Coast | Mountain_West | South_Central | South | Midwest | Northeast | Southeast | Canada | International
Cohort_Forager | Cohort_Prepper | Cohort_Homesteader | Cohort_GiftBuyer | Cohort_Herbalist. Final assigned cohort after survey + behavioral signal review.
yes | no | unknown. 'yes' = confirmed subscriber in Kit with matching email. All Phase 1 buyers are 'unknown' unless they signed up to Kit via landing page.
etsy_organic | kit_email | pinterest | instagram | tiktok | reddit | direct | unknown
Integer. 0 = first-time buyer with no confirmed repeat. Increment as repeat orders are appended below.
Days between this order and the buyer's first repeat purchase. Blank until repeat confirmed.
Lifetime value estimate. For Phase 1 buyers with no repeat: use cohort benchmark. Forager: $170. Prepper: $220. Homesteader: $160. GiftBuyer: $45. Herbalist: $180. Update as repeat data accumulates.
Running sum of all net order values for this buyer across all orders. Update each time a repeat order is appended.
yes | no | pending. 'yes' = buyer made at least one Phase 2 purchase. Used to measure Phase 2 upsell effectiveness on Phase 1 cohort.
Any anomaly or data quality flag.
